name: The Mish Dish
brief: An awesome, no life-story included, full-stack recipe-saving application.
description:
The Mish Dish as a unique & personalised food-blog with a twist. 

 Originally starting off with a Weebly site, Mish realised the inherent shortcomings of a WYSIWYG website builder and requested I help her with setting up a food blog. 

 She required the ability to administer the recipes themselves and needed the blog to have a unique UX & UI that enticed readers to return.

name: Varkhart
brief: Varkhart is a proudly Afrikaans full-stack custom online store with extensive backend functionality.
description:
Varkhart started as a small e-commerce store but has since grown to a vast online retail endeavour with a substantial online presence. Originally built upon my custom e-commerce platform, it has since grown to encompass fully-fledged reseller, affiliate & coupon programs. 

I was involved for every step of the project, from branding to product development.
features: Affiliate code system (with automatic payment splitting, code tracking & invoice management)
Coupon code system (newsletter subscriptions + upsell coupons with sms integration)
Custom dashboard for managing products, orders, affiliates, resellers, coupons & shop settings

name: Gemma Institute
brief: GEMMA's bilingual website offers information about clinic & a detailed application process.
description:
The GEMMA Institute is a Psychotherapy Clinic based in Frankfurt, Germany. They assist individuals, couples and families experiencing personal and social challenges.

I met their needs by creating a clean & modern website where they can effectively communicate their therapeutic concept and how their therapy works. Custom functionality includes the ability for patients to apply for & complete the relevant consent documentation online, as well as provide feedback for their sessions at the clinic. 

 Their website is available in both English & German.
features: Custom & detailed therapy application & feedback forms

name: Art By Jaret
brief: An online art exhibition with a fully-fledged custom online store selling artworks & gifts.
description:
Hundredfold is an Africa focused strategy company that prides itself in international networks and global collaborations. 

They were in need of a sleek & modern brand identity and accompanying website to show off their capabilities & the industries they operate in.
features: Custom dashboard (CMS) for managing products, orders, artwork & shop settings

name: Webdacity
brief: My studio's own website showcasing services & portfolio projects.
description: Webdacity is my web development & design studio based in CapeTown, South Africa. The website provides more information about Webdacity's history, services & past projects.

name: C-DOC
brief: A full-stack online shop & catalogue ordering system combined with a brochure site.
description:
Hundredfold is an Africa focused strategy company that prides itself in international networks and global collaborations. 

They were in need of a sleek & modern brand identity and accompanying website to show off their capabilities & the industries they operate in.
features: Custom dashboard (CMS) for managing products, orders, blog posts & shop settings

name: Together Through Skills
brief: A modern & fun website done for TTS to showcase their skills development services & solutions.
description: Together Through Skills (TTS), a recruitment, training and placement company, focusing on youth employment, entrepreneurship development, rural communities and people living with disabilities

name: NC Chemicals
brief: A full-stack E-Commerce app for browsing & buying chemical cleaning products.
description:
NC Chemicals is a manufacturer and distributor of cleaning chemicals for the car wash and industrial industry. 

They originally needed a simple online presence featuring who they are and what they do, as well as accompanying print documents to be designed showcasing their product catalogue. 

I recommended integrating my e-commerce platform into their website to function as a one-stop-shop to showcase & sell their products online, from anywhere.
features: Custom dashboard (CMS) for managing products, orders, & shop settings

name: Oosthuizens Attorneys
brief: A dark & minimalist website for a law firm based in Johannesburg.
description: Oosthuizens Attorneys requested a minimalist site where potential clients can reach them, learn more about their history and the legal services they offer and also get in touch with them regarding legal advice.

name: HundredFold
brief: A dark & moody website for an African business strategy firm in Johannesburg
description:
Hundredfold is an Africa focused strategy company that prides itself in international networks and global collaborations. 

They were in need of a sleek & modern brand identity and accompanying website to show off their capabilities & the industries they operate in.

name: CCPT
brief: A website for an engineering firm building specialised power and control panels.
description:
Cape Control Panel Technology (CCPT) is an engineering firm that builds specialised power and control panels. 

They needed a concise website showcasing their capabilities, their team of experts and projects they 've undertaken in the past.

name: Africaneur IQ
brief: A unique one-page website specialising in BBBEE Economic Transformation.
description:
AfricaneurIQ (AIQ) is a professional service company that delivers rapid, equitable and sustainable economic transformation through Enterprise and Supplier Development. 

They had a well-crafted brand identity and required a website revamp that truly captures their existing brand image and defines what they do in a succinct and easy to digest manner.

name: SmartFunder
brief: Friendly & fun front-end for a bursary and educational finance administration firm.
description: SmartFunder is a mechanism for Employers in South Africa to assist their employees to pay school fees in a smarter, more tax-efficient way. They wanted a website that reflects their friendly, user-centric brand and provides information regarding their services in a simple, easy-to-understand way. Their main goal was to explain how their business model works and answer any lingering questions.

name: Reset Capital
brief: A minimalist one-page website for an investment firm focusing in BEE companies.
description:
Reset Capital (RC) is an investment firm with a unique focus on investment opportunities in BEE companies. 

Their site features content regarding their funding principles and investment focus, presented in a clean and minimalistic fashion.

name: Craft Consulting
brief: A website built for Craft Consulting, a Cape Town based Civil & Structural Engineering firm.
description:
Craft Consulting is a Cape Town based Civil & Structural Engineering firm. 

They needed a minimalist & clean website to showcase their services & previous projects. They struggled with establishing a good design with the DIY website builder Wix and required professional help with their website's redesign. 

They requested to keep the dark & moody theme, but with a complete design overhaul & updated content to match their current brand image.

name: PR Engineering
brief: A website for an engineering film, showcasing their services & past projects.
description:
PR Engineering is a consulting engineering firm providing comprehensive and value-driven design and project management services. 

They were in the market for a website with the primary focus being to exhibit their past & current engineering products to prospective new clients. The website also needed to properly showcase the array of professional services they offer & other important information relating to the company.

name: U & Me Wedding
brief: One-pager wedding site displaying important information about the special day.
description: One-pager wedding site displaying important information about the special day in an easy to digest and mobile-friendly manner.

name: Asante2gether
brief: Brand Identity
description:
Asante2gether assists local communities to generate income, to find their purpose, and to enable self-sufficiency. 

 I created a friendly and clean brand identity for Asante2gether that portrays their journey in assisting with skills-development to help people move from poverty to prosperity.

name: HundredFold
brief: Brand Identity
description:
Hundredfold is an African focus strategy company that prides itself in international networks and global collaborations. 

They were in need of a sleek & modern brand identity with a dark/moody feel.

name: Reset Capital
brief: Brand Identity
description: Reset Capital (RC) is an investment firm based in Johannesburg with a unique focus on investment opportunities in BEE companies.

name: Together Through Skills
brief: Brand Identity
description: Together Through Skills (TTS) is a recruitment, training and placement company, focusing on youth employment, entrepreneurship development, rural communities and people living with disabilities.

brief: Brand Identity
description: NC Chemicals is a manufacturer and distributor of cleaning chemicals for the car wash and industrial industry.
